hooks.command: $j = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $j.tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match 'ENVIRONMENT=production' -and $cmd -notmatch 'PRODUCTION_CONFIRMED=true' -and ($cmd -match 'ENABLE_PLACE_ORDER=true' -or $cmd -match 'k6')) { $reason = if ($cmd -match 'ENABLE_PLACE_ORDER=true') { 'Order placement on production requires -e PRODUCTION_CONFIRMED=true in addition to ENABLE_PLACE_ORDER=true' } else { 'Production k6 runs require -e PRODUCTION_CONFIRMED=true' }; @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason=$reason}} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }

$j = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $j.tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match 'git commit') { $d = git diff --cached; if ($d -match '[0-9a-f]{64}' -or $d -match 'K6_CLOUD_TOKEN\s*=') { @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason='Staged changes contain a token-like secret (64-hex string or K6_CLOUD_TOKEN=). Unstage the secret before committing.'}} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } }

if (Get-Command k6 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { k6 version } else { Write-Output 'k6 is NOT on PATH. On manual-extract machines run: $env:PATH += ";C:\Tools\k6-v2.0.0" — on admin machines install via: winget install k6' }
